/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libqcap2.processing.so -o lib/libqcap2.processing.so CMakeFiles/qcap2_processing.dir/src/qcap2.processing.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN" lib/libqcap2.sync.so lib/libqcap2.formats.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswresample.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswscale.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavfilter.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavutil.so lib/libqcap2.buffer.so
